backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two confirmed features in OrderForm: showing the QRIS QR code only after order confirmation, and resetting all order state when 'Confirm Payment Received' is triggered.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom properties for a warm color palette in both light and dark modes using the OKLCH color system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting the page title to 'Welcome to SUMOJI', linking a favicon, and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages order state (items, quantities) and renders Hero, Menu, OrderForm, Footer, and Toaster components.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying SUMOJI branding, a DKI Jakarta address, a WhatsApp link with a green icon, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a dim sum background image, SUMOJI branding, 'Steam. Snap. Repeat.' tagline, and an 'Order Now' button that smooth-scrolls to the menu.
frontend/src/components/Menu.tsx: Menu section rendering three dim sum items (Porsian, Party Pack 40pcs, Party Pack 50pcs) with ingredient checkboxes, quantity controls, and add-to-order functionality.
frontend/src/components/OrderForm.tsx: Two-step order form where Step 1 collects contact/delivery info and Step 2 reveals the QRIS QR code payment section only after order confirmation; 'Confirm Payment Received' clears all localStorage data and reloads the page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated via Internet Identity) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaymentTimer.ts: Manages a countdown timer for active orders stored in localStorage, tracking payment status (pending/paid/expired) and exposing formatted time remaining. Provides helpers to save, load, clear, and mark orders as paid.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file for React Query hooks, noting that all order data is stored locally in the browser.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm red/gold dim sum theme, including light/dark mode variables and utility classes like hero-gradient and gold-shimmer.
frontend/src/lib/formatCurrency.ts: Utility function that formats a number as Indonesian Rupiah currency string (e.g., 'Rp. 17.500,-') using locale-aware thousand separators.
frontend/src/lib/formatWhatsAppMessage.t: Formats order details (items, totals, customer info) into a structured WhatsApp message string in Indonesian for the SUMOJI Dim Sum ordering system.
frontend/src/lib/openWhatsApp.ts: Opens a WhatsApp chat to a hardcoded business number with a pre-encoded message using the wa.me URL scheme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that renders the App component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH color tokens, custom border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the SUMOJI POS/ordering app, documenting existing features (QRIS QR code shown post-order-confirmation, order reset on payment confirmation) and pending feature requests.
